summary: Iteration 70 - Rate Limiting Middleware & Platform Integration Expansion - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED

BACKEND: publish_to_bigcommerce function exists in platform_integrations.py

verified_features.verification: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset, X-RateLimit-Plan headers added to authenticated API responses. Elite user verified with 600/min limit. Exempt endpoints (/api/health, /api/auth/*, /api/scoring/methodology) confirmed without headers.
publish_to_etsy function exists (line ~350), POST /api/connections/store accepts 'etsy', config has store_url (Shop ID), api_key, access_token fields
publish_to_bigcommerce function exists (line ~420), POST /api/connections/store accepts 'bigcommerce', config has store_url, api_key, access_token fields
publish_to_squarespace function exists (line ~490), POST /api/connections/store accepts 'squarespace', config has store_url, api_key fields

verified_features.feature: Full Automation Badges for All Stores
verified_features.verification: All 5 store platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, BigCommerce, Squarespace) display 'Full Automation' badge in green on Platform Connections page
Meta and TikTok show 'Auto-Post Ads' badge, Google Ads shows 'Draft Only' badge
Component renders with 'Your data is sourced from real platforms' text showing Amazon, Google Trends, TikTok, AliExpress, Meta Ad Library
Component renders with 'How Our Scores Work' title and 'Transparent scoring' badge, shows Launch Score Breakdown with formula

mocked_apis.note: Google Ads integration returns DRAFT status (MOCKED). Etsy/BigCommerce/Squarespace API calls are REAL but require valid user credentials to succeed - routing and function existence verified.
real_apis: Rate limiting middleware with X-RateLimit headers
mocked_apis: Google Ads - returns DRAFT with ad copy for user to paste manually

critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting middleware correctly implemented with PLAN_LIMITS dict (free:30, starter:120, pro:300, elite:600, admin:1000)
connections.py routes POST /api/connections/publish/{store_id} to correct platform function
PlatformConnectionsPage.jsx STORE_AUTOMATION updated all 5 platforms to 'Full Automation'
Rate limit headers visible even through Cloudflare proxy at external URL

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Platform Connections, Dashboard, Product Detail features verified via Playwright)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified: Rate limiting middleware with per-user per-plan limits (elite user has 600/min), Etsy/BigCommerce/Squarespace integrations added with real API functions. Frontend updated with 'Full Automation' badges for all 5 store platforms. Google Ads remains 'Draft Only' (MOCKED). Set localStorage 'trendscout_onboarding_complete' to 'true' to skip onboarding. Platform connections page at /settings/connections.
